lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically reliable and has been well-maintained. There are minor signs of cosmetic wear on the interior and exterior consistent with regular use.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it was delivered. The exterior finish is flawless, with no chips, swirls, or scratches of any kind. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, with the leather and trim showing zero signs of wear and still retaining a new-car scent. Mechanically, it is perfect, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. This is a collector-grade example that will satisfy even the most discerning buyer.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing a rare find for a discerning buyer. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or chips, and the interior remains in showroom condition with no signs of wear on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Every feature and electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a collector-quality example that drives like new.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and comfort! This vehicle is in good condition and has clearly been well-maintained, offering a smooth and dependable ride for its next owner. It's a fantastic choice for anyone looking for a quality car that's ready to hit the road today!
The vehicle is in fair condition. It is operational but shows visible wear on both the interior and exterior. Some mechanical components may need service soon.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for safety and road-readiness. Offering a seamless blend of reliability and sophisticated engineering, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking quality and enduring value.

Hey there! I’m so excited to help this awesome car find its next owner! 🚗 It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really wonderful shape. It drives super smoothly, looks great, and has plenty of life left in it for all your upcoming adventures. I’ve always made sure to stay on top of things, so it's ready to hit the road as soon as you are! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to chat!

It runs like a dream and has been well-maintained, so it's ready to hit the road whenever you are. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love how it handles!

Used car in good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and clean, complemented by a smoke-free cabin and a fully functional suite of modern technology features. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; the engine pulls strong, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. All scheduled maintenance has been performed on time, with comprehensive service records available for your peace of mind. It is a reliable, turn-key example that looks and drives beautifully, ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of robust mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it ensures reliable performance and represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber automobile at a competitive market position.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional character and proven reliability. This unit has been curated for its mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation, offering a sophisticated balance of performance and utility. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who values both quality and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolute gold for me. It's in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the new-car price tag. I've taken great care of it, so it's ready to hit the road with its next owner today. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS timing. The powertrain is paired with a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, delivering torque through a variable M differential lock. Recent mechanical updates include reinforced subframe mounting points and a comprehensive VANOS service to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. The chassis maintains excellent torsional rigidity, supported by a well-sorted suspension setup that provides precise turn-in and lateral stability. While displaying minor cosmetic signs of use, the mechanical vitals are strong, offering a visceral, high-performance experience with structural integrity intact.
Used car in good condition. Engine runs smooth. Interior is clean. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of performance and comfort, making it an ideal choice for a discerning driver. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections that reflect its well-cared-for history. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features plush, clean upholstery and a fully functional suite of modern electronics, including a crisp sound system and ice-cold climate control. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a comprehensive service history and a recent multi-point inspection that confirms all systems are go. With excellent tread left on the tires and responsive, firm braking, this car provides a safe and confident ride. It is a reliable, high-quality example of its model, ready for immediate enjoyment without the need for any additional investment.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and stands as a testament to diligent ownership, providing exceptional value within its class.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and has been well-loved over the years. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend road trip, this beauty is ready to go! It's got plenty of life left in it and is looking for a new home where it'll be appreciated just as much as I've loved it. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used car in good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and practicality. The exterior retains its deep, original luster, with only minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful highway use. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with plush seating; the upholstery remains supple, showing only light softening on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, benefiting from a documented service history that includes a recent fluid flush and a fresh set of high-performance tires. It drives straight and true, offering a smooth, responsive experience that reflects its history of responsible ownership. This is a turn-key example for a buyer who values both reliability and aesthetic appeal.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a harmonious balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and mechanically sound, it presents in commendable condition both aesthetically and operationally. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to quality, ensuring a refined and reliable driving experience that exceeds the standard expectations for its class.
